sections.title: Outcomes
sections.body_markdown:
- **Delivered** **regional failover** playbook to production — exercised in **game day** with **0** customer-visible errors.
- **Unblocked** **API** team on **cert rotation** design — RFC merged with **2** follow-up tickets (**INF-440**, **INF-441**).

sections.title: Collaboration
sections.body_markdown:
- **Reviewed** **24** PRs (median latency under **4h**); **paired** **3h** on incident hotfix **INC-1820**.
- **Authored** deploy rollback runbook updates adopted by **SRE** (link in **Links**).

sections.title: Growth
sections.body_markdown:
- Deeper in **Kubernetes** networking — completed targeted module; next: shadow **on-call** primary in **June**.
- **Public:** internal **lunch & learn** on **circuit breakers** (recording in Drive — internal only).

sections.title: Asks
sections.body_markdown:
- **1 day** in next sprint for **spike** on **ingress cost model** — flagged in **1:1** with EM (**approved**).
- **Access** to **staging** project **vendor-sandbox** for integration tests — ticket **IT-99** opened.
